file_insights.purpose: Hilt dependency injection module for database configuration

patterns_discovered.description: Using Hilt framework with @Module and @InstallIn(SingletonComponent) for centralized dependency provision
patterns_discovered.significance: Establishes DI infrastructure for database components

patterns_discovered.description: Using @Qualifier annotations (@DatabaseName, @DatabaseVersion) to distinguish multiple String/Int dependencies
patterns_discovered.significance: Enables type-safe injection of configuration values

patterns_discovered.description: All providers are annotated with @Singleton for single-instance lifecycle
patterns_discovered.significance: Ensures database configuration values are created once

patterns_discovered.description: Module structure established with commented example and TODO for future Room integration
patterns_discovered.significance: Demonstrates architectural intent while deferring full implementation

gotchas_discovered.description: The actual Room database provisioning is commented out and marked as TODO
gotchas_discovered.impact: Cannot create InventoryDatabase instances through DI yet

gotchas_discovered.description: Provider functions don't include Context, which is required for Room.databaseBuilder()
gotchas_discovered.impact: Will need to add Context parameter when implementing the database provider

gotchas_discovered.description: @DatabaseName and @DatabaseVersion qualifiers must be used in dependent classes to resolve correctly
gotchas_discovered.impact: Qualifiers are defined but not yet consumed by other components

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created DatabaseModule as a Hilt DI module for database configuration
deliverables: Hilt module structure with @Module and @InstallIn annotations
Two provider functions for database metadata (name and version)
Two custom qualifier annotations for type-safe injection
Clear documentation with TODO comments for Room integration

recommendations.description: Uncomment and complete the provideDatabase() function when Room dependency is added, including Context injection and database builder configuration
Define the Room database abstract class with DAOs before the database provider function can be fully implemented

recommendations.recommendation: Use custom qualifiers in consumer code
recommendations.description: Update classes that depend on database name/version to use @DatabaseName and @DatabaseVersion annotations
Consider how database schema migrations will be handled as @DatabaseVersion increases
Once DAOs are created, consider whether they should be provided through this module
